summary: This 8-week roadmap is designed to transform a skilled Python developer into a proficient AI Engineer, focusing on high-demand areas like Deep Learning, Generative AI, LLMs, and cloud deployment. It builds upon existing ML knowledge, progressing through foundational AI concepts to advanced application development with frameworks like LangChain and LlamaIndex, culminating in practical cloud deployment skills.

weeks.goal: Understand core deep learning principles and implement basic neural networks using a popular framework.

weeks.theme: Understanding Generative AI and Large Language Models
weeks.goal: Grasp the landscape of Generative AI, understand LLM fundamentals, and craft effective prompts.

weeks.theme: Mastering LLM Interaction and Prompt Design
skills: Interacting with LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Hugging Face)
weeks.goal: Proficiently interact with various LLMs programmatically and apply advanced prompt engineering for complex tasks.
Develop robust LLM-powered applications using LangChain and LlamaIndex for structured interactions.

skills: RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) architecture and implementation
Vector Databases (Pinecone, ChromaDB, Weaviate - concepts and integration)
weeks.goal: Design and implement RAG systems to provide LLMs with up-to-date and domain-specific information.

skills: Building multi-agent workflows for complex problem-solving
weeks.goal: Create sophisticated AI agent systems capable of autonomous task execution and collaboration.

weeks.theme: Deploying AI Solutions on the Cloud
skills: API deployment with FastAPI (leverage existing skill)
weeks.goal: Deploy an LLM-powered application or deep learning model to a major cloud platform.

skills: Potentially explore Kubernetes (basic concepts for scaling) or Image Processing (if project-relevant)
weeks.goal: Develop and present a comprehensive AI Engineer project, demonstrating an end-to-end solution from model to deployment.
